text: Russian cyberspies associated with APT28, a GRU-linked group, had targeted Polish government networks with malicious software in May 2024, underscoring a sustained campaign against Polish institutions. This context of repeated Russian cyber activity targeting Poland preceded and informed the attribution of the PAP hack to Russian state-sponsored actors as part of a larger pattern of hostile cyber operations.
attribution_coding_note: NASK text states prior APT28/GRU activity 'informed the attribution of the PAP hack to Russian state-sponsored actors as part of a larger pattern'; pattern-based assessment, document dated before the incident.
